title: Richly Toasted Turkish Hazelnut Pide
description: A Turkish dish featuring shelled hazelnuts and a cheese-pull, perfect for a crowd, this pide is a floral and delicious whole30-friendly option
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a bowl, mix together almond flour, eggs, salt, and black pepper
Add crumbly feta cheese to the bowl and mix until a dough forms
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each into a ball
Roll out each ball into a thin circle
Brush the circles with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds
Place the circles in the air fryer and cook for 5 minutes
While the pide is cooking, toast the hazelnuts in a pan over medium heat for 2 minutes
Once the pide is cooked, top each circle with toasted hazelnuts and serve
